question: F1: 2026 Canadian Grand Prix (Montreal) Mercedes Winner?
textDescription:
This market resolves based on the main race (Grand Prix) on Sunday, not the sprint race on Saturday.

YES if either Kimi Antonelli or George Russell wins.

I will be betting as well.
newsShortReason: Kimi Antonelli's recent victories and George Russell's mechanical issues make Mercedes' win unlikely.
newsKeyEvidence: Kimi Antonelli won the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix after George Russell's mechanical failure. | Russell and Antonelli secured the front-row lockout in qualifying. | Russell and Antonelli have been the main contenders for Mercedes this season.
